chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1720 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6767/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 21-10-2025 Mr. Daman Ali Leghari, Advocate along with Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with SIP Ghulam Shabbir Khuhro, SHO PS Mirwah, SIP Liaquat Ali, SIP Iran Khan Ujjan, SIP Nazakat Ali and SIP Ali Murad Narejo on behalf of SSP, Khairpur >>>>>><<<<<<< Mr. Azmat Ali Arain, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No.6 and 7, which is taken on record, Learned AAG files statements on behalf of Respondents 2, 3 and 4, which are also taken on record, copies whereof are provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. Learned Additional AG submits that the cases bearing Crime No.56 of 2025 under Sections 452, 337-A(i), F(i), 147, 148 and 149 PPC and Crime No.184 of 2025 under Sections 452, 114, 337-A(i), F(i), 147, 148 and 149 PPC, both registered with Police Station, Mirwah, District Khairpur, the quashment whereof has been sought through this Petition, have now been challaned before the Court of law, having jurisdiction, where the proceedings are pending. Under the circumstances, this petition through which quashment is being sought of the FIRs mentioned above, have already been challaned and are pending trial before the Court of law, being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. However, the accused persons, who are involved in the aforesaid FIRs, may approach the trial Court by filing application u/s 249-A or 265-K Cr.PC, as the case may be, for appropriate relief.

Under the circumstances, this petition through which quashment is being sought of the FIRs mentioned above, have already been challaned and are pending trial before the Court of law, being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. However, the accused persons, who are involved in the aforesaid FIRs, may approach the trial Court by filing application u/s 249-A or 265-K Cr.PC, as the case may be, for appropriate relief. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
